questions.question: Who taught Hanuman the art of speech?
questions.cypher: MATCH p=(s:Entity)-[:TAUGHT]->(o:Entity {name:'Hanuman'}) RETURN s.name AS Answer, p;

questions.question: Who blessed Hanuman with immortality?
questions.cypher: MATCH p=(s:Entity)-[:BLESSED]->(o:Entity {name:'Hanuman'}) RETURN s.name AS Answer, p;

questions.question: Who gave the bow to Parashurama?
questions.cypher: MATCH p=(s:Entity)-[:GIFTED]->(o:Entity {name:'Parashurama'}) RETURN s.name AS Answer, p;

questions.question: Who invited Rama to Mithila?
questions.cypher: MATCH p=(s:Entity)-[:INVITED]->(o:Entity {name:'Rama'}) RETURN s.name AS Answer, p;

questions.question: Who welcomed Rama in Lanka first?
questions.cypher: MATCH p=(s:Entity)-[:WELCOMED]->(o:Entity {name:'Rama'}) RETURN s.name AS Answer, p;

questions.question: Who welcomed Rama in Lanka first?
questions.cypher: MATCH p=(s:Entity {name:'Vibhishana'})-[:WELCOMED]->(o:Entity {name:'Rama'}) RETURN s.name AS Answer, p;

questions.question: Who narrated the Ramayana to Rama’s sons?
questions.cypher: MATCH p=(s:Entity {name:'Valmiki'})-[:NARRATED]->(o:Entity {name:'Ramayana'}) RETURN s.name AS Answer, p;

questions.question: Who instructed Vibhishana to join Rama?
questions.cypher: MATCH p=(s:Entity {name:'Kaikesi'})-[:ADVISED]->(o:Entity {name:'Vibhishana'}) RETURN s.name AS Answer, p;

questions.question: Who led the bear army in the war?
questions.cypher: MATCH p=(s:Entity {name:'Jambavan'})-[:LED]->(o:Entity {name:'BearArmy'}) RETURN s.name AS Answer, p;

questions.question: Who healed Lakshmana after battle?
questions.cypher: MATCH p=(s:Entity {name:'Sushena'})-[:HEALED]->(o:Entity {name:'Lakshmana'}) RETURN s.name AS Answer, p;

questions.question: Who informed Sita about Rama’s victory?
questions.cypher: MATCH p=(s:Entity {name:'Hanuman'})-[:INFORMED]->(o:Entity {name:'Sita'}) RETURN s.name AS Answer, p;

questions.question: Who carried Rama’s message to Sugriva?
questions.cypher: MATCH p=(s:Entity {name:'Hanuman'})-[:DELIVERED]->(o:Entity {name:'Message'}) RETURN s.name AS Answer, p;

questions.question: Who first saw Sita in Ashoka Vatika?
questions.cypher: MATCH p=(s:Entity {name:'Hanuman'})-[:SAW]->(o:Entity {name:'Sita'}) RETURN s.name AS Answer, p;

questions.question: Who broke the curse on Kabandha?
questions.cypher: MATCH p=(s:Entity {name:'Rama'})-[:BROKE]->(o:Entity {name:'Kabandha'}) RETURN s.name AS Answer, p;

questions.question: Who built the first shelter in forest exile?
questions.cypher: MATCH p=(s:Entity {name:'Lakshmana'})-[:BUILT]->(o:Entity {name:'Hut'}) RETURN s.name AS Answer, p;

questions.question: Who comforted Sita after golden deer incident?
questions.cypher: MATCH p=(s:Entity {name:'Lakshmana'})-[:COMFORTED]->(o:Entity {name:'Sita'}) RETURN s.name AS Answer, p;

questions.question: Who brought news of Ravana’s death to Lanka?
questions.cypher: MATCH p=(s:Entity {name:'Vibhishana'})-[:REPORTED]->(o:Entity {name:'Death'}) RETURN s.name AS Answer, p;

questions.question: Who carried Rama’s sandals to Ayodhya?
questions.cypher: MATCH p=(s:Entity {name:'Bharata'})-[:CARRIED]->(o:Entity {name:'Sandals'}) RETURN s.name AS Answer, p;

questions.question: Who trained Lava and Kusha in warfare?
questions.cypher: MATCH p=(s:Entity {name:'Valmiki'})-[:TRAINED]->(o:Entity {name:'LavaKusha'}) RETURN s.name AS Answer, p;

questions.question: Who sang the Ramayana before Rama?
questions.cypher: MATCH p=(s:Entity {name:'Kusha'})-[:SANG]->(o:Entity {name:'Ramayana'}) RETURN s.name AS Answer, p;
